speaker: speaker1
text: What's wrong with you , young man ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Doctor , I have a bad cough and a headache .

speaker: speaker2
text: I don't know , but I feel terrible .

speaker: speaker1
text: Let me examine you . Don't worry . It's nothing serious .

speaker: speaker2
text: Do you think I should lie in bed ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , stay in bed and drink a lot of water . Your fever will be gone in a day or two .

speaker: speaker2
text: OK . Do you think I can play football tomorrow ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Of course not . You need a good rest .
